default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on account prioritization and tiering strategy for Okta and OddZero, focusing on retail sector implementation and expansion to other sectors.](https://fathom.video/share/eZ1gkabtb8anwxhyh18h-TbE1zu89PG2?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - Implement simple tiering model: Tier 1 (70% signals), Tier 2 (50% signals), Tier 3 (\<50% signals)
  - [Expand focus from OddZero (retail) to include Okta products for comprehensive account targeting](https://fathom.video/share/eZ1gkabtb8anwxhyh18h-TbE1zu89PG2?tab=summary&timestamp=1744.0)
  - [Prioritize big-picture strategy over intricate details; iterate and refine approach over time](https://fathom.video/share/eZ1gkabtb8anwxhyh18h-TbE1zu89PG2?tab=summary&timestamp=1645.0)
  - [Leverage GrowthX research capabilities to enhance and validate data accuracy beyond Clay](https://fathom.video/share/eZ1gkabtb8anwxhyh18h-TbE1zu89PG2?tab=summary&timestamp=1231.0)

## Topics

### Account Prioritization Framework

  - [Develop a clear, justifiable method for selecting target accounts](https://fathom.video/share/eZ1gkabtb8anwxhyh18h-TbE1zu89PG2?tab=summary&timestamp=605.0)
  - [Focus on key signals like loyalty programs, security incidents, and industry-specific factors](https://fathom.video/share/eZ1gkabtb8anwxhyh18h-TbE1zu89PG2?tab=summary&timestamp=610.0)
  - [Aim to demonstrate process and reasoning to executives for strategic decisions](https://fathom.video/share/eZ1gkabtb8anwxhyh18h-TbE1zu89PG2?tab=summary&timestamp=1489.0)

### Tiering System Implementation

  - [Implement 3-tier system based on percentage of signals met:](https://fathom.video/share/eZ1gkabtb8anwxhyh18h-TbE1zu89PG2?tab=summary&timestamp=1021.0)
      - [Tier 1: 70%+ signals met](https://fathom.video/share/eZ1gkabtb8anwxhyh18h-TbE1zu89PG2?tab=summary&timestamp=1027.0)
      - [Tier 2: 50-69% signals met](https://fathom.video/share/eZ1gkabtb8anwxhyh18h-TbE1zu89PG2?tab=summary&timestamp=1029.0)
      - Tier 3: \<50% signals met
  - [Use tiering to guide SDR, ABX team, and automated nurture efforts](https://fathom.video/share/eZ1gkabtb8anwxhyh18h-TbE1zu89PG2?tab=summary&timestamp=1184.0)

### Data Accuracy and Research

  - [GrowthX to enhance research beyond Clay's capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/eZ1gkabtb8anwxhyh18h-TbE1zu89PG2?tab=summary&timestamp=1231.0)
  - [Validate sources for critical signals (e.g., security breaches)](https://fathom.video/share/eZ1gkabtb8anwxhyh18h-TbE1zu89PG2?tab=summary&timestamp=1327.0)
  - [Balance between quick insights and thorough verification](https://fathom.video/share/eZ1gkabtb8anwxhyh18h-TbE1zu89PG2?tab=summary&timestamp=1428.0)

### Okta and OddZero Strategy Alignment

  - [Explore complementary targeting for Okta and OddZero products](https://fathom.video/share/eZ1gkabtb8anwxhyh18h-TbE1zu89PG2?tab=summary&timestamp=1803.0)
  - [Example: Toyota - Okta for finance/workforce, OddZero for dealership/retail](https://fathom.video/share/eZ1gkabtb8anwxhyh18h-TbE1zu89PG2?tab=summary&timestamp=1849.0)
  - [Improve cross-selling capabilities between product lines](https://fathom.video/share/eZ1gkabtb8anwxhyh18h-TbE1zu89PG2?tab=summary&timestamp=1921.0)

### Partnerships and Ecosystem

  - [Identify accounts working with key partners (e.g., Deloitte, Accenture, EY)](https://fathom.video/share/eZ1gkabtb8anwxhyh18h-TbE1zu89PG2?tab=summary&timestamp=1981.0)
  - [Leverage partnerships with companies like Palo Alto, Zscaler, CrowdStrike, Akamai](https://fathom.video/share/eZ1gkabtb8anwxhyh18h-TbE1zu89PG2?tab=summary&timestamp=1981.0)
